# Phase 7: `v2` Procedural and Self Model Memory - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-04
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Mode:** Auto-generated from contradiction resolution completion and roadmap goals

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

This phase makes procedural and self-model memory explicit enough that `memd`
can stop treating them as implicit tags and note patterns.

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

- Prefer typed extensions over a whole new subsystem.
- Keep runbooks and self-model memory queryable through current retrieval surfaces.
- Make failure modes and capabilities inspectable, not magical.

</decisions>
